raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Children in the entertainment industry face unique and serious vulnerabilities, including long hours, high-pressure environments, and close interactions with adults in positions of power.",
    "A growing number of former child stars have come forward with painful stories of abuse and exploitation they endured on set.",
    "California's Child Abuse and Neglect Reporting Act (CANRA) was passed in 1980 to create a system for identifying and addressing child abuse by requiring certain professionals to become mandated reporters.",
    "AB 2338 (Levine, 2018) mandated talent agencies to provide educational materials on sexual harassment prevention, but did not include any reporting requirements.",
    "AB 653 adds talent agents, talent managers, and talent coaches to the list of mandated reporters for child abuse in the entertainment industry.",
    "Paris Hilton has helped pass 13 state laws aimed at protecting youth and is involved in advocating for further protection measures."
  ]
}
```
